betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Radiation-Powered Engine§f

§aTurn nuclear waste into power — consistent decay, guaranteed output!§f

§bThe Radiation-Powered Engine§f is a great way to get power from RBMK-type nuclear waste, with guaranteed consistent decay times. The blueprint is only obtainable via the §bSurvivalist's Journal§f.

§6Crafting§f (§bAssembly Factory§f):
§b• 8×§f Steel Ingot
§b• 32×§f Steel Plate
§b• 64×§f 4000K High-Temperature Superconducting Coil
§b• 24×§f 4000K High-Temperature Superconductor
§b• 16×§f Integrated Circuit Board
§b• 1×§f Breeding Reactor Core
§b• 1×§f Starmetal Ingot
§b• 1×§f Red Dye

§6Usage§f:
§b• 12 input slots§f on the left, each with a corresponding progress bar
§b• Hover§f over each bar to see: decay process, ticks remaining, HE/tick output
§b• Right slots§f — decayed items are dispensed here

§6Acceptable Fuels§f:
§b• Long-Lived Nuclear Waste§f
§b• Short-Lived Nuclear Waste§f
§b• Radioactive Scraps§f (from shredding Sellafite tiers)

§eTip§f: The engine is a great sink for long-lived waste that would otherwise be difficult to dispose of. Each slot decays independently, so filling all 12 slots maximizes power output. Monitor the progress bars to see exactly how much HE you're generating per tick!
